'''majofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feathering|feathering]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feathering|feathering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| majofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæjefeth|mæjefeth]] || [[word:mæjefej|mæjefej]] || [[word:mæjefesh|mæjefesh]] || [[word:mæjefe|mæjefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:majojofoth|majojofoth]] || [[word:majojofoj|majojofoj]] || [[word:majojofosh|majojofosh]] || [[word:majojofo|majojofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:majofoth|majofoth]] || [[word:majofoj|majofoj]] || [[word:majofosh|majofosh]] || [[word:majofo|majofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:majoffofth|majoffofth]] || [[word:majoffofj|majoffofj]] || [[word:majoffofsh|majoffofsh]] || [[word:majoffof|majoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:majofotho|majofotho]] || [[word:majofojo|majofojo]] || [[word:majofosho|majofosho]] || [[word:majofoko|majofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:majofoth|majofoth]] || [[word:majofoj|majofoj]] || [[word:majofosh|majofosh]] || [[word:majofo|majofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:majofothol|majofothol]] || [[word:majofojol|majofojol]] || [[word:majofoshol|majofoshol]] || [[word:majofokol|majofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:majofoothotho|majofoothotho]] || [[word:majofoojojo|majofoojojo]] || [[word:majofooshosho|majofooshosho]] || [[word:majofooko|majofooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:majofothon|majofothon]] || [[word:majofojon|majofojon]] || [[word:majofoshon|majofoshon]] || [[word:majofokon|majofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:majofothooro|majofothooro]] || [[word:majofojooro|majofojooro]] || [[word:majofoshooro|majofoshooro]] || [[word:majofokooro|majofokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
